articles.title: Israeli soldier wounded by drone as attacks continue in south Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli soldier wounded by drone as attacks continue in south Lebanon The Israeli military said one soldier was wounded earlier on Wednesday “as a result of an explosive drone impact”. The announcement came as Israeli forces continued extensive air strikes and artillery attacks across southern Lebanon. A recent strike on the town of al-Saksakieh killed at least five people and wounded 15 others, according to Lebanon’s National News Agency.

articles.title: Iran urges UN states to reject US-backed Hormuz resolution
articles.summary: Iran urges UN states to reject US-backed Hormuz resolution Iran’s permanent mission to the United Nations has called on member states to oppose a draft resolution backed by the US and Gulf allies that pressures Tehran to guarantee safe shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. In a post on X, the mission described the proposal as “flawed” and “politically motivated”. “The only viable solution in the Strait of Hormuz is clear: a permanent end to the war, the lifting of the maritime blockade, and the restoration of normal passage,” the mission said. articles.title: Iran says no formal response yet to latest US proposal
